title: (Bullish Signal) ARKW, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling ARKW's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 55 similar cases where ARKW's MACD histogram became positive, and 48 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $172.30 is above $121.94 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/31/20 - 02/03/21, the price experienced a +17% Uptrend. During the week of 01/27/21 - 02/03/21, the ETF enjoyed a +8% Uptrend growth. 

https://preview.redd.it/slno7xkxghf61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=2d36cee7c5374d56f1838eb48bb3ad394f2dd6cc

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ARKW just turned positive on February 03, 2021. Looking at past instances where ARKW's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 48 of 55 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

ARKW moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 14, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +3.99% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ARKW advanced for three days, in 379 of 432 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 420 of 492 cases where ARKW Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 85%.
